description: Baseline observability requirements ensuring production issues can be detected, diagnosed, and resolved quickly.

requirements.text: All API endpoints and critical business operations emit structured log entries with correlation IDs, timestamps, and outcome (success/failure)
requirements.intent: Every significant operation must be traceable in production
requirements.verifiable_by: Trigger API calls and business operations; confirm structured log output with correlation IDs

requirements.text: Application exposes a health check endpoint (or equivalent) that reports service status and dependency connectivity
requirements.intent: Operational status must be machine-queryable for monitoring and alerting
requirements.verifiable_by: Call health endpoint; confirm it reports up/down status for the service and its dependencies

requirements.text: Errors and exceptions are reported to an error tracking service (e.g., Sentry) with sufficient context to reproduce — stack trace, user action, environment
requirements.intent: Production errors must be captured with enough context to diagnose without reproduction
requirements.verifiable_by: Trigger an error; confirm it appears in error tracker with stack trace and contextual metadata

requirements.text: CLI tools exit with appropriate codes (0 = success, non-zero = failure) and write errors to stderr, output to stdout
requirements.intent: CLI tools must be composable in pipelines and scripts
requirements.verifiable_by: Run CLI with valid and invalid inputs; confirm correct exit codes and stream separation
